title: WorkflowDefinition
description: Protocol-owned workflow definition family with explicit deterministic gate planning.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for workflow definition objects.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this workflow definition.

workflow_id.description: Stable logical workflow identity referenced by compiled run plans.

executor_bindings.description: Reviewed executor bindings available to planner-selected gates.

binding_id.description: Stable binding identity referenced by planned gate entries.

executor_id.description: Trusted executor registry identity bound for dispatch and policy validation.

executor_class.description: Execution risk class expected by policy for this binding.

allowed_role_kinds.description: Role kinds allowed to dispatch this executor binding.

items.description: One allowed role kind for this binding.

description.description: Optional human-facing summary for operator diagnostics.

gate_definitions.description: Explicit gate ordering and checkpoint placement declared by workflow planning.
